positive: A dramatic portrait of a cybernetic dragon coiled around futuristic circuitry and glowing neon pipes. Sci-fi cyberpunk style, highly detailed metallic scales, dramatic volumetric lighting, neo-Tokyo atmosphere, vibrant blue and electric pink accents.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, soft lighting, natural background, watercolor, childish, simple, pastel
